purpose: Project a small SVG and HTML visual proof surface in the temp bench.

content: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="920" height="360" viewBox="0 0 920 360" role="img" aria-label="Compiler proof visual">
<rect x="0" y="0" width="920" height="360" fill="#f6f7fb"/>
<rect x="36" y="44" width="848" height="272" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d0d7de"/>
<text x="64" y="96" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#0f172a">Compiler Proof</text>
<text x="64" y="136" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#334155">JSON authority in, governed artifact out.</text>
<rect x="64" y="176" width="234" height="116" rx="10" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity="0.14" stroke="#0ea5e9"/>
<text x="86" y="212" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#0369a1">Source JSON</text>
<text x="86" y="242" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#075985">SEJ contract</text>
<text x="86" y="264" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#075985">resolver-ready</text>
<rect x="343" y="176" width="234" height="116" rx="10" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.14" stroke="#22c55e"/>
<text x="365" y="212" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#166534">Resolver</text>
<text x="365" y="242" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#14532d">compiles</text>
<text x="365" y="264" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#14532d">fail-closed</text>
<rect x="622" y="176" width="234" height="116" rx="10" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.14" stroke="#f59e0b"/>
<text x="644" y="212" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#92400e">Outputs</text>
<text x="644" y="242" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#78350f">SVG + HTML</text>
<text x="644" y="264" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#78350f">receipts</text>
<line x1="298" y1="234" x2="343" y2="234" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<line x1="577" y1="234" x2="622" y2="234" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<defs>
<marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
</marker>
</defs>
</svg>
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<title>Compiler Proof</title>
<style>
body { margin: 0; background: #f6f7fb; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: #0f172a; }
main { padding: 32px; }
.frame { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px; max-width: 920px; }
.caption { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #475569; }
svg { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<main>
<div class="frame">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="920" height="360" viewBox="0 0 920 360" role="img" aria-label="Compiler proof visual">
<rect x="0" y="0" width="920" height="360" fill="#f6f7fb"/>
<rect x="36" y="44" width="848" height="272" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d0d7de"/>
<text x="64" y="96" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#0f172a">Compiler Proof</text>
<text x="64" y="136" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#334155">JSON authority in, governed artifact out.</text>
<rect x="64" y="176" width="234" height="116" rx="10" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity="0.14" stroke="#0ea5e9"/>
<text x="86" y="212" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#0369a1">Source JSON</text>
<text x="86" y="242" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#075985">SEJ contract</text>
<text x="86" y="264" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#075985">resolver-ready</text>
<rect x="343" y="176" width="234" height="116" rx="10" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.14" stroke="#22c55e"/>
<text x="365" y="212" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#166534">Resolver</text>
<text x="365" y="242" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#14532d">compiles</text>
<text x="365" y="264" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#14532d">fail-closed</text>
<rect x="622" y="176" width="234" height="116" rx="10" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.14" stroke="#f59e0b"/>
<text x="644" y="212" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#92400e">Outputs</text>
<text x="644" y="242" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#78350f">SVG + HTML</text>
<text x="644" y="264" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#78350f">receipts</text>
<line x1="298" y1="234" x2="343" y2="234" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<line x1="577" y1="234" x2="622" y2="234" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
<defs>
<marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
</marker>
</defs>
</svg>
This page is a resolver-materialized visual proof surface from temp JSON authority.
</main>
</body>
</html>

content.completionPosture: The compiler can project a visual surface as both SVG and HTML from JSON authority.
